skills.name: Grenade Throw
skills.description:
Throw a grenade forward, dealing Explosion Damage.
Deals additional damage to enemies inflicted with Burn.
The thrown Grenades can be Towed.

skills.name: Overclock
skills.description:
Gains Overclock and Overload. Inflicts Burn on enemies damaged by Grenade Throw or Overkill.
When firing a Firearm gradually decreases Overload.

skills.name: Traction Grenade
skills.description: Throws a Traction Grenade forward to inflict Towed on enemies within range.

skills.name: Overkill
skills.description: Equips a Unique Weapon. While the Unique Weapon is equipped, MP is continuously consumed. When MP runs out, the weapon is unequipped. Enemies hit by Unique Weapon bullets take Burst DMG. The impact point of the Unique Weapon creates a damage zone, dealing continuous damage.

skills.name: Close Call
skills.description:
Upon receiving fatal damage, gains Close Call. While 
Close Call is active, grants DMG Immunity and Immobilization. When 
Close Call ends, recovers HP proportional to own Max HP.

skills.name: Orbit Barrier
skills.description:
Creates a Barrier in front that blocks ranged damage. The Barrier increases in stats proportionally to Ajax's stats.
Inflicts Void Leakage on enemies that touch the Barrier, and additionally deals Reflection Damage to enemies that attack the Barrier.
When attacking enemies inflicted with Void Leakage using a firearm, grants Void Acceleration to self.
While Void Acceleration is active, instantly reloads weapons with available Rounds when Rounds per Magazine reaches 0.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases Reflection Damage.

skills.name: Void Walk
skills.description:
Jumps forward and deals damage upon landing, inflicting Stun.
When using an Enhanced Skill grants the Leap Enhancement effect.

skills.name: Expulsion
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies and inflicts Knockback. When using an Enhanced Skill increases base damage and range.
Additionally, Taunts all enemies within a wider range.

skills.name: Hyper Cube
skills.description:
Creates a dome-shaped Barrier that blocks damage. The Barrier increases in stats proportionally to Ajax's stats.
Grants Enhanced DEF to allies inside the Barrier and inflicts Weaken Attack on enemies.
When using an Enhanced Skill, grants allies an additional Barrier Enhancement.

skills.name: Event Horizon
skills.description:
When the skill ends, gains Void Energy.
The amount of Void Energy determines Singularity effect.
When Void Energy is at maximum, use an Enhanced Skill. When using an Enhanced Skill grants additional effects to the existing skill.
Cannot gain Void Energy while using an Enhanced Skill, and Void Energy is consumed if Out of Combat.

skills.name: Frost Shards
skills.description: Fires Frost Shards to deal damage to hit enemies and Burst damage to nearby enemies. Inflicts Ice Shackle on hit enemies.

skills.name: Frost Road
skills.description:
Activates the Frost Road state. 
While in the Frost Road state, creates Ice Sheets on the ground touched. Enemies that touch the Ice Sheets are inflicted with Ice Shackle.

skills.name: Cold Snap
skills.description: Launches Chill toward the front. Inflicts damage and Ice Shackle on enemies that come into contact with Chill.

skills.name: Blizzard
skills.description: Creates a Blizzard at a designated location. Enemies within the Blizzard take continuous damage. When the Blizzard ends, it explodes and deals Burst DMG to nearby enemies. Inflicts Ice Shackle on hit enemies.

skills.name: Ice Sphere
skills.description:
Upon using a skill to put an enemy into an Ice Shackle stage, creates an Ice Sphere that flies around nearby.
The Ice Sphere that is created flies at a nearby enemy, dealing damage to the hit enemy and Burst damage to nearby enemies.
The hit enemy is inflicted with Ice Shackle.
Ice Shackle decreases the Speed, and increases in stage when the effect stacks.

skills.name: Grenade Throw
skills.description:
Throw a grenade forward, dealing Explosion Damage.
Deals additional damage to enemies inflicted with Burn.
The thrown Grenades can be Towed.

skills.name: Overclock
skills.description:
Gains Overclock and Overload. Inflicts Burn on enemies damaged by Grenade Throw or Overkill.
When firing a Firearm gradually decreases Overload.

skills.name: Traction Grenade
skills.description: Throws a Traction Grenade forward to inflict Towed on enemies within range.

skills.name: Overkill
skills.description: Equips a Unique Weapon. While the Unique Weapon is equipped, MP is continuously consumed. When MP runs out, the weapon is unequipped. Enemies hit by Unique Weapon bullets take Burst DMG. The impact point of the Unique Weapon creates a damage zone, dealing continuous damage.

skills.name: Close Call
skills.description:
Upon receiving fatal damage, gains Close Call. While 
Close Call is active, grants DMG Immunity and Immobilization. When 
Close Call ends, recovers HP proportional to own Max HP.

skills.name: Assault Turret
skills.description:
Summons an Assault Turret. The Assault Turret remains on the battlefield to attack enemies.
If hit by a Unique Weapon, it creates a Damage Zone that deals continuous damage to nearby enemies.
When removed, the turret establishes an Explosion Range that deals Explosion Damage to nearby enemies.
The number of turrets on the battlefield are added together and if the maximum limit is exceeded, the first turret summoned will be removed.

skills.name: Medical Turret
skills.description:
Summons a Medical Turret. The Medical Turret recovers the HP of allies and turrets in the Recovery Zone and reduces Incoming Damage for Assault Turrets.
If hit by a Unique Weapon, it creates a Taunt Zone that taunts enemies inside the zone.
When removed, the turret establishes an Explosion Range that deals Explosion Damage to nearby enemies.
The number of turrets on the battlefield are added together and if the maximum limit is exceeded, the first turret summoned will be removed.

skills.name: Multi-purpose Gun
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. The Unique Weapon causes an explosion at the point of impact, dealing Explosion Damage.
If a turret is in the explosion range, each hit creates a Turret Zone, restores health to the turret, and increases the turret's duration.
The cooldown is adjusted based on the number of bullets fired.

skills.name: Reactivate
skills.description:
Detonates a summoned turret, granting Overhaul. The self-destruction releases multiple fragments around, dealing Explosion DMG.
While holding Overhaul, summon turrets within the Turret Zone.

skills.name: Turret Sync
skills.description: When two or more Turrets are summoned, gains Turret Sync.

skills.name: Thrill Bomb
skills.description:
Creates a Thrill Bomb that targets the nearest enemy within range, dealing damage. This damage increases proportionally to the amount of Electricity.
Inflicts Electrocution on enemies hit.

skills.name: Speed of Light
skills.description:
Always moves by Sprinting, and increases Sprint Speed.
Gains Speed of Light. Speed of Light additionally gains Electricity while moving.

skills.name: Lightning Emission
skills.description: Activates the Lightning Emission state. Deals damage to nearby enemies when moving a certain distance, increases damage proportional to the amount of Electricity. Inflicts Electrocution on enemies hit.

skills.name: Maximum Power
skills.description: Discharges electricity forward. Deals damage on enemies that come into contact with the electricity, with the damage increasing gradually based on the discharge time. Ends when Electricity runs out.

skills.name: Rabbit Foot
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies upon landing after a Double Jump.
Gains Electricity proportional to the travel distance.
If there is no movement for a certain period, Electricity is gradually consumed.

skills.name: Orbit Barrier
skills.description:
Creates a Barrier in front that blocks ranged damage. The Barrier increases in stats proportionally to Ajax's stats.
Inflicts Void Leakage on enemies that touch the Barrier, and additionally deals Reflection Damage to enemies that attack the Barrier.
When attacking enemies inflicted with Void Leakage using a firearm, grants Void Acceleration to self.
While Void Acceleration is active, instantly reloads weapons with available Rounds when Rounds per Magazine reaches 0.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases Reflection Damage.

skills.name: Void Walk
skills.description:
Jumps forward and deals damage upon landing, inflicting Stun.
When using an Enhanced Skill grants the Leap Enhancement effect.

skills.name: Expulsion
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies and inflicts Knockback. When using an Enhanced Skill increases base damage and range.
Additionally, Taunts all enemies within a wider range.

skills.name: Hyper Cube
skills.description:
Creates a dome-shaped Barrier that blocks damage. The Barrier increases in stats proportionally to Ajax's stats.
Grants Enhanced DEF to allies inside the Barrier and inflicts Weaken Attack on enemies.
When using an Enhanced Skill, grants allies an additional Barrier Enhancement.

skills.name: Event Horizon
skills.description:
When the skill ends, gains Void Energy.
The amount of Void Energy determines Singularity effect.
When Void Energy is at maximum, use an Enhanced Skill. When using an Enhanced Skill grants additional effects to the existing skill.
Cannot gain Void Energy while using an Enhanced Skill, and Void Energy is consumed if Out of Combat.

skills.name: Venom Trauma
skills.description:
Fires a Toxic Bullet, dealing damage to hit enemies.
The Toxic Bullet explodes, creating a Toxic Puddle and inflicting Room 0 Trauma on those it hits.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Panic to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Defense Mechanism
skills.description:
Gains Plague Bodyarmor. Inflicts Room 0 Trauma on the attacking enemy.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Despair to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Putrid Venom
skills.description:
Throw poison to create a Toxic Swamp.
Enemies that touch the Toxic Swamp are inflicted with Room 0 Trauma and Venom-Soaked.
Venom-Soaked enemies leave Toxic Footprints as they move.
Toxic Footprints apply Room 0 Trauma to enemies on contact.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Decay to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Venom Baptism
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. Unequipped after all bullets are consumed or after a certain period of time has passed.
Enemies hit by the Unique Weapon bullets are inflicted with Room 0 Trauma.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Nightmare to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Contagion Links
skills.description:
When an enemy inflicted with Room 0 Trauma is killed, it spawns a Toxic Puddle. Enemies that step in the Toxic Puddle are inflicted with Room 0 Trauma.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Toxic Reaction to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Frenzied
skills.description: In Frenzied state. In Frenzied state, increases Firearm ATK and Penetration, but reduces HP Recovery.

skills.name: Life Siphon
skills.description:
Deals damage to targets within range and recovers HP.
HP Recovery amount increases based on the number of enemies hit.
In Frenzied state, deals increased DMG proportionally to HP.
In Non-Frenzied state, gains Vigor. Vigor stacks proportionally to the number of enemies hit.

skills.name: Increased Sensory
skills.description:
When in Frenzied state, applies Maximize Lethality during which bullets are not consumed.
When in Non-Frenzied state, applies Maximize Recovery during which Life Sphere generation is increased.

skills.name: Massacre
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. The number of bullets enhanced is affected by the amount of Power of Life owned.
When hitting an enemy with the Unique Weapon, weaves through enemies to deal damage and inflict additional effects.
In Frenzied state, increases additional damage proportionally to HP.
In Non-Frenzied state, inflicts Stun on enemies that are hit.

skills.name: Thirst
skills.description:
Cannot have Shield or MP.
In Non-Frenzied state, reduces Incoming DMG.
Defeated enemies have a chance to drop Life Spheres which, upon contact, grant Power of Life.
Upon acquiring Power of Life, recovers HP.

skills.name: Frost Shards
skills.description: Fires Frost Shards to deal damage to hit enemies and Burst damage to nearby enemies. Inflicts Ice Shackle on hit enemies.

skills.name: Frost Road
skills.description:
Activates the Frost Road state. 
While in the Frost Road state, creates Ice Sheets on the ground touched. Enemies that touch the Ice Sheets are inflicted with Ice Shackle.

skills.name: Cold Snap
skills.description: Launches Chill toward the front. Inflicts damage and Ice Shackle on enemies that come into contact with Chill.

skills.name: Blizzard
skills.description: Creates a Blizzard at a designated location. Enemies within the Blizzard take continuous damage. When the Blizzard ends, it explodes and deals Burst DMG to nearby enemies. Inflicts Ice Shackle on hit enemies.

skills.name: Ice Sphere
skills.description:
Upon using a skill to put an enemy into an Ice Shackle stage, creates an Ice Sphere that flies around nearby.
The Ice Sphere that is created flies at a nearby enemy, dealing damage to the hit enemy and Burst damage to nearby enemies.
The hit enemy is inflicted with Ice Shackle.
Ice Shackle decreases the Speed, and increases in stage when the effect stacks.

skills.name: Cutoff Beam
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in front with a Cutoff Beam while moving. Inflicts Electrocution.

skills.name: Active Camouflage
skills.description:
Enters Active Camouflage, concealing the user from enemies' sight.
Holding the skill input moves you to the designated location.
Attacking an enemy or ending Active Camouflage triggers Ambush.
Using a firearm or skill while in Ambush applies the effect and ends it.

skills.name: Shock Nuts
skills.description:
Fires Shock Nuts embedded in the arm forward, dealing damage to enemies and inflicting Stun.
In addition, inflicts Assassination Target on the enemy with the highest HP within range.

skills.name: Flash Shortsword
skills.description: Generates multiple Shortswords and fires them at a designated target. Hit enemies take Explosion Damage and are inflicted with Electrocution. The Shortswords deal greater damage to Assassination Target. While holding the skill input, fire using the attack button and cancel using the aim button. Cancelling does not trigger a cooldown.

skills.name: Assassinator
skills.description: When in Ambush state, killing an enemy by using a skill resets the Active Camouflage cooldown. This effect gains cooldown. When attacking, increases DMG against enemies who are not targeting the caster.

skills.name: Blaze Up
skills.description: Spews fire and creates a Flame Zone on the ground. Enemies standing in the Flame Zone receive continuous damage and are inflicted with Burn.

skills.name: Extinguish
skills.description:
Recovers HP and MP based on the number of Flame Zones created on the battlefield, and grants Taste of Aggression on recovery.
Flame Zones summoned earlier are retrieved first.

skills.name: Burn Taste
skills.description: Fires a flame forward . Enemies hit by the flame take continuous damage and are inflicted with Burn.

skills.name: Deadly Cuisine
skills.description:
Fires a Giant Fireball forward. On explosion, the Giant Fireball deals Burst damage to nearby enemies and divides into multiple Small Fireballs, which create additional explosions. 
Small Fireballs deal Burst damage and inflict Burn on nearby enemies, and create Flame Zones.

skills.name: Pitmaster
skills.description:
When attacking enemies inflicted with Burn, increases Skill Critical Hit Damage.
Increases Skill Critical Hit Rate based on the number of Flame Zones created on the battlefield.

skills.name: Bubble Bullet
skills.description:
Fires a bouncing Bubble Bullet. Where the Bubble Bullet impacts, it creates a Small Puddle at the point of collision.
Enemies who touch the Small Puddle take continuous DMG and are inflicted with Laundry.
The Bubble Bullet explodes upon hitting an enemy or after bouncing a maximum number of times, dealing Explosion Damage on nearby enemies.
Explosion Damage and Explosion Range increase with the number of times bounced.

skills.name: Plop Plop
skills.description:
Forms a Big Puddle at a designated location.
Emerges from the Big Puddle and inflicts Knockdown on nearby enemies.
Enemies standing in the Big Puddle receive continuous DMG and are inflicted with Laundry. The skill's cooldown decreases proportionally to the number of enemies inflicted with Knockdown.

skills.name: Clean Up
skills.description:
Activates Liquefied state. While Liquefied, does not collide with enemies and creates a Waterway on the ground.
Enemies standing in the Waterway take continuous damage and are inflicted with Laundry.
In the Liquefied state, cannot use skills.

skills.name: Laundry Bomb
skills.description:
Equip a Unique Weapon. The projectile impact of the Unique Weapon creates a Laundry Bomb, dealing continuous damage.
If another Laundry Bomb is created where a Laundry Bomb exists, the two Laundry Bombs merge.

skills.name: Water Intake
skills.description:
Recovers Shield and MP while on water.
Puddles created by skills are also considered water.

skills.name: Repulsion Dash
skills.description:
Charges forward to deal damage to pierced enemies and inflicts Knockback on enemies at the end of the charge.
After using the skill, recovers Magnetic Force proportionally to Max Shield and recovers additional Magnetic Force based on the number of enemies hit.
When the skill ends, grants DEF Increase to self.
Using the skill resets the number of Jumps and holding down the skill key increases the distance traveled.

skills.name: Magnetic Bulwark
skills.description:
Creates a moving Barrier that blocks enemy ranged attacks.
Using the Barrier recovers Magnetic Force. Every time the Barrier blocks an attack, recovers additional Magnetic Force proportional to the damage blocked. Inflicts Stun on enemies on contact.
Recovers Magnetic Force based on the number of times the Barrier inflicts Stun on enemies.

skills.name: Magnetism Spurt
skills.description:
When hit by enemies in the Magnetism Spurt state, Magnetic Force is consumed instead of Shield and HP.
When all Magnetic Force is consumed or the skill button pressed again, discharges Magnetic Force to deal damage.
When the skill ends, restores Shields to nearby allies and self proportional to Max Shield.

skills.name: Superconductivity Thrusters
skills.description:
When used on the ground, activates Superconductivity Thrusters to soar into the air before descending.
When used in midair, immediately descends and collides with enemies, dealing damage on collision. Damage increases proportionally to the amount of Magnetic Force consumed.
When the skill ends, Magnetic Force is fully consumed.
While using the skill, becomes immune to Knockdown and Knockback.

skills.name: Experienced Technician
skills.description:
Max amount of Magnetic Force increases proportionally to Max Shield. When the Shield is fully consumed, gains Magnetic Care. This effect has a cooldown.
Magnetic Force gradually decreases while Out of Combat.

skills.name: Time Bomb
skills.description: Fires a Sticky Bomb forward. The Sticky Bomb attaches to an enemy or terrain on contact.

skills.name: Blast
skills.description:
Detonate the attached bombs.
Damage dealt increases with the number of attached bombs.

skills.name: Guided Landmine
skills.description:
Places a Guided Landmine.
Once placed, the Guided Landmine flies to an enemy within its detection range and attaches to it.
If there are obstacles in its path, it attaches to the terrain.

skills.name: Arche Explosion
skills.description:
Dashes forward to deal DMG and inflict Knockback on colliding targets during movement.
Interacting with the skill button again or ending movement deals Burst DMG to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by the explosion lose their buffs.
When the skill ends, grants self Madness.
While using skill, becomes immune to Knockdown and Knockback.

skills.name: Adventitious Habit
skills.description: Drops a bomb on the ground when hit.

skills.name: Start Supply
skills.description: Summons a Bullet Supplying Device at the designated location. The Bullet Supplying Device supplies bullets and grants Firearm Reinspection to allies who approach it. The Bullet Supplying Device can be used once by each ally, and disappears when everyone has used it or its duration ends.

skills.name: Explosive Drone
skills.description:
Launches an Explosive Drone forward.
The Explosive Drone explodes on contact with an enemy or a terrain object, dealing Explosion Damage.
Using the skill Reloads the firearm in use.

skills.name: Enhance Combat Suit
skills.description:
Summons Shield Recovery Comms.
When the Shield Recovery Comms is first summoned, it recovers the Shield and grants Enhance Combat Suit.

skills.name: Perfect Support
skills.description:
Summons a Small Supply Ship for self and allies.
The Small Supply Ship provides Supply Bullets and grants Perfect Support to allies.
The Small Supply Ship attacks enemies in front while it is active. When an Explosive Drone is used, Enzo's Small Supply Ship fires Small Missiles forward that explode.
When the skill ends, it fires a Big Missile forward that causes a large explosion.

skills.name: Firing Specialist
skills.description:
Consuming bullets activates Prep Effects that match the type of bullets.
Activating 2 Prep Effects grants Firing Specialist to self. When changing weapons, auto-reloads stored weapon.
The effect increases the efficiency of disarming the security of Encrypted Vaults and also the rewards for successful disarming.

skills.name: Solidarity Healing
skills.description:
Attaches a Healing Drone to an ally.
The Drone is dismissed if it strays too far from the target or when its duration expires.
Drones grant the Continuous Healing effect, and upon expiration of the Drone's duration, they apply the Accelerant effect to allies and the user.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Restructure Serum
skills.description:
Fires Restructure Serum forward.
Enemies hit by Restructure Serum are inflicted with Allergy.
Attacking enemies with Allergy heals nearby allies.
Defeating an enemy with Allergy further heals the Descendant.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Stimulant Spray
skills.description:
Grants Stimulation to nearby allies.
Allies receive healing proportional to the number of times they were hit when Stimulation ends.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Duty and Sacrifice
skills.description:
Upon use, instantly recovers Yujin's, and all his allies', HP in the Party or Squad. It also grants Purification effect.
When the skill ends, grants Yujin Hyper Activity.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Stop Overreacting
skills.description:
Significantly reduces the time it takes to rescue allies.
Rescued allies gain Additional Prescription.

skills.name: Stage Presence
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. It will be unequipped when MP is fully depleted or all bullets have been fired.
When the Unique Weapon is equipped, Notes activates, allowing the use of skills.
Notes can be hit through shooting and skill use. If the skill button is not pressed at the right time, the skill will enter cooldown.
Failing to hit Notes through shooting significantly decreases MP.
Successfully hitting Notes grants Perfect Pitch.

skills.name: Passionate Stage
skills.description:
Grants Exciting Performance to self. Grants Exciting Sound to allies within range.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases the effects further.

skills.name: Relaxing Act
skills.description:
Grants Relaxing Performance to self. Relaxing Performance recovers MP when hitting enemies while hitting Notes.
Grants Relaxing Sound to allies within range.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases the effects further.

skills.name: Delightful Stage
skills.description:
Grants Cheerful Performance to self. 
Cheerful Performance acquires Inspiration Gauge when hitting enemies while hitting Notes.
Grants Cheerful Sound to allies within range.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases the effects further.

skills.name: Improvisation
skills.description:
When using a skill to hit the Note, Inspiration Gauge goes up. When the Inspiration Gauge maxes out, an Enhanced Skill can be used.
Using an Enhanced Skill changes to this skill's song and completely depletes Inspiration Gauge. While Out of Combat for a certain period of time, Inspiration Gauge is completely depleted.

skills.name: Thrill Bomb
skills.description:
Creates a Thrill Bomb that targets the nearest enemy within range, dealing damage. This damage increases proportionally to the amount of Electricity.
Inflicts Electrocution on enemies hit.

skills.name: Speed of Light
skills.description:
Always moves by Sprinting, and increases Sprint Speed.
Gains Speed of Light. Speed of Light additionally gains Electricity while moving.

skills.name: Lightning Emission
skills.description: Activates the Lightning Emission state. Deals damage to nearby enemies when moving a certain distance, increases damage proportional to the amount of Electricity. Inflicts Electrocution on enemies hit.

skills.name: Maximum Power
skills.description: Discharges electricity forward. Deals damage on enemies that come into contact with the electricity, with the damage increasing gradually based on the discharge time. Ends when Electricity runs out.

skills.name: Rabbit Foot
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies upon landing after a Double Jump.
Gains Electricity proportional to the travel distance.
If there is no movement for a certain period, Electricity is gradually consumed.

skills.name: Frenzied
skills.description: In Frenzied state. In Frenzied state, increases Firearm ATK and Penetration, but reduces HP Recovery.

skills.name: Life Siphon
skills.description:
Deals damage to targets within range and recovers HP.
HP Recovery amount increases based on the number of enemies hit.
In Frenzied state, deals increased DMG proportionally to HP.
In Non-Frenzied state, gains Vigor. Vigor stacks proportionally to the number of enemies hit.

skills.name: Increased Sensory
skills.description:
When in Frenzied state, applies Maximize Lethality during which bullets are not consumed.
When in Non-Frenzied state, applies Maximize Recovery during which Life Sphere generation is increased.

skills.name: Massacre
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. The number of bullets enhanced is affected by the amount of Power of Life owned.
When hitting an enemy with the Unique Weapon, weaves through enemies to deal damage and inflict additional effects.
In Frenzied state, increases additional damage proportionally to HP.
In Non-Frenzied state, inflicts Stun on enemies that are hit.

skills.name: Thirst
skills.description:
Cannot have Shield or MP.
In Non-Frenzied state, reduces Incoming DMG.
Defeated enemies have a chance to drop Life Spheres which, upon contact, grant Power of Life.
Upon acquiring Power of Life, recovers HP.

skills.name: Cryo Round
skills.description:
Fires a Cryo Round at enemies in front to deal damage and inflict Cryo.
Targets with Cryo stacks receive additional damage and lose 1 stack when hit by Hailey's firearm attack.

skills.name: Storm Snare
skills.description: Unleashes a Chill Vortex around her, knocking back hit targets and firing a massive Freezing Beam in the direction of the crosshairs. Inflicts Cryo on targets hit based on Enemy AoE.

skills.name: Cold Fury
skills.description:
Grants Hailey Cold Fury every second. The Cold Fury effect gradually decreases her Movement Speed, but greatly increases her Firearm and Skill Critical Hit Rates and Firearm Penetration.
When Cold Fury reaches maximum stacks, Hailey becomes immune to Knockdown and gains an increase to her Firearm and Skill Critical Hit Damage. However, when using Roll or Grappling Hook, the stacks decrease.

skills.name: Zenith
skills.description:
Equips her Unique Weapon. When hitting an enemy with the Unique Weapon, greatly increases Penetration and Firearm ATK and deals additional Chill skill damage.
Recovers a portion of MP upon successfully attacking Weak Points.
Partially decreases the Cooldown of the Unique Weapon skill when the skill ends depending on the number of fired bullets.

skills.name: Safe Strategic Retreat
skills.description: Proportional to the distance between the target and Hailey, the Weak Point Damage decreases the closer it is to the target and increases the further it is.

skills.name: Bubble Bullet
skills.description:
Fires a bouncing Bubble Bullet. Where the Bubble Bullet impacts, it creates a Small Puddle at the point of collision.
Enemies who touch the Small Puddle take continuous DMG and are inflicted with Laundry.
The Bubble Bullet explodes upon hitting an enemy or after bouncing a maximum number of times, dealing Explosion Damage on nearby enemies.
Explosion Damage and Explosion Range increase with the number of times bounced.

skills.name: Plop Plop
skills.description:
Forms a Big Puddle at a designated location.
Emerges from the Big Puddle and inflicts Knockdown on nearby enemies.
Enemies standing in the Big Puddle receive continuous DMG and are inflicted with Laundry. The skill's cooldown decreases proportionally to the number of enemies inflicted with Knockdown.

skills.name: Clean Up
skills.description:
Activates Liquefied state. While Liquefied, does not collide with enemies and creates a Waterway on the ground.
Enemies standing in the Waterway take continuous damage and are inflicted with Laundry.
In the Liquefied state, cannot use skills.

skills.name: Laundry Bomb
skills.description:
Equip a Unique Weapon. The projectile impact of the Unique Weapon creates a Laundry Bomb, dealing continuous damage.
If another Laundry Bomb is created where a Laundry Bomb exists, the two Laundry Bombs merge.

skills.name: Water Intake
skills.description:
Recovers Shield and MP while on water.
Puddles created by skills are also considered water.

skills.name: Venom Trauma
skills.description:
Fires a Toxic Bullet, dealing damage to hit enemies.
The Toxic Bullet explodes, creating a Toxic Puddle and inflicting Room 0 Trauma on those it hits.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Panic to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Defense Mechanism
skills.description:
Gains Plague Bodyarmor. Inflicts Room 0 Trauma on the attacking enemy.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Despair to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Putrid Venom
skills.description:
Throw poison to create a Toxic Swamp.
Enemies that touch the Toxic Swamp are inflicted with Room 0 Trauma and Venom-Soaked.
Venom-Soaked enemies leave Toxic Footprints as they move.
Toxic Footprints apply Room 0 Trauma to enemies on contact.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Decay to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Venom Baptism
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. Unequipped after all bullets are consumed or after a certain period of time has passed.
Enemies hit by the Unique Weapon bullets are inflicted with Room 0 Trauma.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Nightmare to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Contagion Links
skills.description:
When an enemy inflicted with Room 0 Trauma is killed, it spawns a Toxic Puddle. Enemies that step in the Toxic Puddle are inflicted with Room 0 Trauma.
Room 0 Trauma deals continuous damage and applies Toxic Reaction to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Void Corrosion
skills.description:
Targets an enemy and fires Void Corrosion. Inflicts Acidic Decay on hit enemies.
Deals Additional Damage to enemies inflicted with Acidic Decay.
The number of targets for Void Corrosion increases based on certain stats.

skills.name: Onslaught
skills.description:
Dashes forward, dealing damage to Pierced targets. At the location the Dash ends, inflicts Knockback and deals Explosion Damage. Inflicts Acidic Decay on hit enemies.
Enemies inflicted with Acidic Decay receive Additional Damage.
Each Pierced enemy reduces the Cooldown of the current stack of Onslaught.

skills.name: Septic Gust
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies within range and inflicts Acidic Decay. If enemies within range are inflicted with Acidic Decay, inflicts Blood Rot. Blood Rot explodes, dealing damage to the target and enemies within range.

skills.name: Tremor
skills.description:
If enemies within range have Acidic Decay, deals damage proportional to the amount of Acidic Decay stacks.
If there are no enemies within range or they don't have Acidic Decay, increases the amount of Onslaught stacks.

skills.name: Erosion
skills.description:
Using a skill increases the Acidic Infusion Level and grants the Agility effect to yourself after a certain number of uses.
If the non-combat state is maintained, the Acidic Infusion Level gradually decreases, and the Agility effect is removed.

skills.name: Cutoff Beam
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in front with a Cutoff Beam while moving. Inflicts Electrocution.

skills.name: Active Camouflage
skills.description:
Enters Active Camouflage, concealing the user from enemies' sight.
Holding the skill input moves you to the designated location.
Attacking an enemy or ending Active Camouflage triggers Ambush.
Using a firearm or skill while in Ambush applies the effect and ends it.

skills.name: Shock Nuts
skills.description:
Fires Shock Nuts embedded in the arm forward, dealing damage to enemies and inflicting Stun.
In addition, inflicts Assassination Target on the enemy with the highest HP within range.

skills.name: Flash Shortsword
skills.description: Generates multiple Shortswords and fires them at a designated target. Hit enemies take Explosion Damage and are inflicted with Electrocution. The Shortswords deal greater damage to Assassination Target. While holding the skill input, fire using the attack button and cancel using the aim button. Cancelling does not trigger a cooldown.

skills.name: Assassinator
skills.description: When in Ambush state, killing an enemy by using a skill resets the Active Camouflage cooldown. This effect gains cooldown. When attacking, increases DMG against enemies who are not targeting the caster.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description:
Fires Chain Lightning forward.
Chain Lightning bounces between multiple enemies, to deal damage and inflict Conductor on enemies hit.
When attacking enemies with Conductor, deals increased damage.

skills.name: Lightning Conductor
skills.description:
Creates Current Coils on nearby enemies, to deal damage.
Creates Current Coils on all enemies with Conductor, to deal damage.
Inflicts Conductor on those hit.
When attacking enemies with Conductor, deals increased damage.

skills.name: Discharge
skills.description:
Charges her hand with electricity and thrusts it forward to release a bolt of lightning.
Charging the current increases the damage and range.
Releasing the charge at the peak deals the most damage.
Inflicts Conductor on enemies hit.
When attacking enemies with Conductor, deals increased damage.

skills.name: Snare Hunter
skills.description:
Throws a Plasma Acceleration Coil forward and creates a Thunder Snare at the point of impact for a certain period of time.
When using skill grants Short Circuit. While Short Circuit is active, Dark Current deals damage at the Max Damage Rate.
Inflicts Conductor on enemies hit by the Thunder Snare.
Thunder Snare creates Current Coils on nearby enemies to deal damage.
When attacking enemies with Conductor, deals increased damage.

skills.name: Plasma Oscillation
skills.description:
Skill Critical Hit Rate increases as Max MP increases.
Skill Critical Hits against enemies with Conductor have a chance to restore MP.
Firearm or Skill Critical Hits on an enemy with Conductor have a chance to cause Dark Current.
Killing enemies with Conductor or the effect expiring still triggers Dark Current.
Dark Current deals a portion of its damage to nearby targets based on Max MP, and inflicts Conductor on enemies hit.
Charges Plasma whenever you inflict Conductor on an enemy.

skills.name: Sacred Flame
skills.description:
Fires flames in the direction of the crosshairs to deal damage and inflict Repentance. On hitting an ally, grants Blessing.
Repentance acts the same as Burn. Firearm attacks against enemies inflicted with Repentance have a chance to recover Rounds for the firearm in use.
Additionally, when an enemy with Repentance is killed, inflicts Repentance on nearby enemies.
Flames pierce terrain when used on the ground and explode when colliding with terrain when fired in midair.

skills.name: Ascension
skills.description: Greatly decreases gravity while this skill is active. Firearm attacks while in mid-air have additional effects depending on the Rounds in use. However, Jump and Grappling Hook charge times have been adjusted.

skills.name: Soar
skills.description:
When used on the ground, Serena shoots into the air.
When used in midair, Serena moves quickly in the direction of movement and Reloads the currently equipped weapon.
Additionally, Serena's number of Jumps is reset and holding down the skill key increases the distance traveled.

skills.name: Redemption
skills.description:
When used on the ground, removes all debuffs on Serena and all allies within range, and grants Prayer of Redemption.
When used in midair, grants Redemption's Judgment to self.

skills.name: Divinity
skills.description: Serena gains an additional stat bonus when firing a firearm in midair.

skills.name: Blaze Up
skills.description: Spews fire and creates a Flame Zone on the ground. Enemies standing in the Flame Zone receive continuous damage and are inflicted with Burn.

skills.name: Extinguish
skills.description:
Recovers HP and MP based on the number of Flame Zones created on the battlefield, and grants Taste of Aggression on recovery.
Flame Zones summoned earlier are retrieved first.

skills.name: Burn Taste
skills.description: Fires a flame forward . Enemies hit by the flame take continuous damage and are inflicted with Burn.

skills.name: Deadly Cuisine
skills.description:
Fires a Giant Fireball forward. On explosion, the Giant Fireball deals Burst damage to nearby enemies and divides into multiple Small Fireballs, which create additional explosions. 
Small Fireballs deal Burst damage and inflict Burn on nearby enemies, and create Flame Zones.

skills.name: Pitmaster
skills.description:
When attacking enemies inflicted with Burn, increases Skill Critical Hit Damage.
Increases Skill Critical Hit Rate based on the number of Flame Zones created on the battlefield.

skills.name: Breach Projection
skills.description:
Fires a barrage of Breach Shards, dealing damage to hit enemies.
If the enemy hit is inflicted with Ecive Scan, an additional effect is triggered.

skills.name: Breach Link
skills.description: Creates an Arche Breach at a designated location. Inflicts a debuff on enemies near the created Arche Breach and spawns an Anti-Gravity Field on the ground. The debuff of the Arche Breach intensifies over time and further weakens Adaptive Defense. Reusing the skill retrieves the Arche Breach. On retrieval, the Anti-Gravity Field disappears, dealing Explosion Damage to the area around it and refunding a portion of the Cooldown.

skills.name: Gravitic Reversal
skills.description:
Detonates an Arche Breach, causing Gravitic Reversal.
Inflicts Tow on enemies near the Arche Breach and deals Explosion Damage to them.

skills.name: Gaze of the Abyss
skills.description:
Grants Gaze of the Abyss.
All Firearm Attacks from Nell target Weak Points, increasing the Weak Point Damage of herself and nearby allies.
While Gaze of the Abyss is active, hitting a target inflicted with Ecive Scan with a Breach Shard increases the duration of Gaze of the Abyss.

skills.name: Suspicion & Insight
skills.description:
When using Ecive, enemies in front are inflicted with the Ecive Scan effect.
When attacking enemies inflicted with the Ecive Scan effect, additional damage is dealt.
When an enemy with the Ecive Scan effect dies, the Ecive Scan effect is applied to nearby enemies.
Enemies positioned at the crosshair are guaranteed to receive the Ecive Scan effect; for Colossi, if the crosshair is near a weak point, that weak point receives the Ecive Scan effect.
When decrypting an Encrypted Vault, efficiency increases, and the reward amount increases upon successful decryption.

skills.name: Stage Presence
skills.description:
Equips a Unique Weapon. It will be unequipped when MP is fully depleted or all bullets have been fired.
When the Unique Weapon is equipped, Notes activates, allowing the use of skills.
Notes can be hit through shooting and skill use. If the skill button is not pressed at the right time, the skill will enter cooldown.
Failing to hit Notes through shooting significantly decreases MP.
Successfully hitting Notes grants Perfect Pitch.

skills.name: Passionate Stage
skills.description:
Grants Exciting Performance to self. Grants Exciting Sound to allies within range.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases the effects further.

skills.name: Relaxing Act
skills.description:
Grants Relaxing Performance to self. Relaxing Performance recovers MP when hitting enemies while hitting Notes.
Grants Relaxing Sound to allies within range.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases the effects further.

skills.name: Delightful Stage
skills.description:
Grants Cheerful Performance to self. 
Cheerful Performance acquires Inspiration Gauge when hitting enemies while hitting Notes.
Grants Cheerful Sound to allies within range.
When using an Enhanced Skill, increases the effects further.

skills.name: Improvisation
skills.description:
When using a skill to hit the Note, Inspiration Gauge goes up. When the Inspiration Gauge maxes out, an Enhanced Skill can be used.
Using an Enhanced Skill changes to this skill's song and completely depletes Inspiration Gauge. While Out of Combat for a certain period of time, Inspiration Gauge is completely depleted.

skills.name: Crushing Charge
skills.description:
Charges forward, swinging the NOVA System to deal damage to the target.
inflict Towed on enemies within range.
Using Crushing Charge consecutively within the Combo Duration enhances the attacks.

skills.name: Site Intrusion
skills.description:
Jumps forward and deals damage on landing.
Gains Protective Barrier proportional to the number of enemies hit.
If no target is hit, the Cooldown of Site Intrusion is partially refunded.

skills.name: Designate Danger Zone
skills.description:
Enters Designate Danger Zone. Consumes Toxin, to deal damage to nearby enemies.
Inflicts Spray Hazardous Substance on hit enemies.
Grants buffs while in Designate Danger Zone.

skills.name: Waste Disposal
skills.description:
The NOVA System emits a Cutting Laser over a wide area.
Inflicts Toxic Contamination on enemies hit by Cutting Laser.
Grants DEF proportional to the number of enemies hit by Cutting Laser.

skills.name: Internal Toxin Control
skills.description:
Gains or consumes Toxin each time a skill is used.
Grants a variety of effects based on the amount of Toxin.
Maintaining a certain amount of Toxin for a certain period of time grants Best Condition for each stage.

skills.name: Solidarity Healing
skills.description:
Attaches a Healing Drone to an ally.
The Drone is dismissed if it strays too far from the target or when its duration expires.
Drones grant the Continuous Healing effect, and upon expiration of the Drone's duration, they apply the Accelerant effect to allies and the user.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Restructure Serum
skills.description:
Fires Restructure Serum forward.
Enemies hit by Restructure Serum are inflicted with Allergy.
Attacking enemies with Allergy heals nearby allies.
Defeating an enemy with Allergy further heals the Descendant.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Stimulant Spray
skills.description:
Grants Stimulation to nearby allies.
Allies receive healing proportional to the number of times they were hit when Stimulation ends.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Duty and Sacrifice
skills.description:
Upon use, instantly recovers Yujin's, and all his allies', HP in the Party or Squad. It also grants Purification effect.
When the skill ends, grants Yujin Hyper Activity.
This skill's recovery increases only when the total amount that make up Skill Power reaches a certain amount.

skills.name: Stop Overreacting
skills.description:
Significantly reduces the time it takes to rescue allies.
Rescued allies gain Additional Prescription.

skills.name: Glacial Clash
skills.description: Using the skill activates Glacial Clash. Using Glacial Clash dashes forward and stabs enemies to deal damage and inflict Knockback. Holding the skill input activates Glacial Breakthrough. Using Glacial Breakthrough moves forward and damages targets on collision. Inflicts Snowflake on targets damaged by this skill. Snowflake creates an AoE that deals Explosion Damage.

skills.name: Ice Wall
skills.description:
Grants Ice Wall to self. Ice Wall increases stats and explodes to deal AoE damage. Using Glacial Breakthrough while Ice Wall is active increases Movement Speed.
When Ice Wall ends, restores HP.

skills.name: Avalanche
skills.description:
Launches an Avalanche forward. Avalanche moves while Towing enemies. Hitting a moving Avalanche with the Glacial Clash Skill triggers a Chill Explosion, which deals AoE damage and inflicts White Panic on enemies. Each time Glacial Clash triggers a Chill Explosion from the same Avalanche, the effect increases.
Hitting with Chill Explosion a certain number of times grants Frost Thorn to self.

skills.name: Frost Storm
skills.description:
Launches a Frozen Spire forward. On hit Frozen Spire decreases Movement Speed and deals continuous damage to enemies within range.
Frozen Spire has a max number of hits and is removed when all hits are exhausted.

skills.name: Frozen Delight
skills.description:
When a melee weapon is equipped, increases stats proportional to Max HP.
When using the Glacial Clash skill, gains Delight proportional to its duration.
Stats increase in proportion to the Delight gauge.
